LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.descript: Call for Brotherhood of Steel food supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.label: BoS food drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Tech_Resource: Call for Brotherhood of Steel technical resources and components.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Uniforms.desc: Call for Brotherhood of Steel standard uniforms.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.descr: Call for Brotherhood of Steel standard issue weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.label: BoS weapon drop
